amountCard.unreadableAmount: Couldn't read that amount — please enter it again

renameAccountModal.nameInputPlaceholder: Enter a name for your account

settings.title: Settings
settings.deleteAccountDisclaimer: Accounts on the Stellar network are immutable and cannot be deleted. However you can remove any account from your Freighter App at any time using the 'Delete account' option. Verify your recovery phrase works before you do this.
settings.deleteAccountConfirmMessage: Make sure you have your recovery phrase in a safe place. You will not be able to recover your wallet without it.

anonymousDataSharing.title: Anonymous data sharing
anonymousDataSharing.description: Allow Freighter to collect limited information about usage. We will collect public keys, transaction amounts, and balances. This information will not be used for marketing or to identify you personally. We will not collect information such as name, address, email addresses, phone numbers, etc.

enable.title: Enable Analytics
enable.description: To enable anonymous data sharing, you'll need to allow tracking permissions in your device settings.
enable.instruction: Tap "Open Settings" below, then find Freighter and enable "Allow Tracking".

disable.title: Disable Analytics
disable.description: To disable anonymous data sharing, you'll need to change tracking permissions in your device settings.
disable.instruction: Tap "Open Settings" below, then find Freighter and disable "Allow Tracking".

hideDust.title: Hide small payments
hideDust.description: Hide received payments smaller than 0.1 XLM

memoValidation.title: Verification with stellar.expert
memoValidation.description: Validate addresses that require a memo

faceId.footerNoteText: You can change this later in Settings.

faceBiometrics.description: Add another layer of security by requiring Face Recognition to unlock your wallet or approve transactions.

lockScreen.title: Welcome back
lockScreen.errorUnlockingWalletMessage: If the problem persists, please tap on "Forgot password" and re-import your wallet.
lockScreen.failedToLoadAccountMessage: Your account could not be loaded after sign-in. Please try again.
lockScreen.forgotPasswordWarningMessage1: We cannot recover your password for you. This process will erase your wallet and you'll need to go through the import wallet flow to re-import your wallet with your recovery phrase.
lockScreen.forgotPasswordWarningMessage2: You will permanently lose access to the account currently stored in Freighter.
lockScreen.forgotPasswordWarningMessage3: Only do this if you have your phrase backed up safely somewhere else.

discovery.legalDisclaimer: These services are operated by independent third parties, not by Freighter or SDF. Inclusion here is not an endorsement. DeFi carries risk, including loss of funds. Use at your own risk.
discovery.welcomeGateway: Your gateway to the Stellar ecosystem. Browse and connect to decentralized applications built on Stellar.

recoveryPhraseWarning.yourRecoveryPhrase: Your recovery phrase gives you full access to your wallets and funds.
recoveryPhraseWarning.ifYouForgetYourPassword: If you forget your password, use the recovery phrase to access your wallet
recoveryPhraseWarning.dontShareWithAnyone: Don't share this phrase with anyone
recoveryPhraseWarning.neverAskForYourPhrase: Stellar Development Foundation will never ever ask for your phrase
recoveryPhraseWarning.ifYouLose: If you lose it, we can't recover it

addCollectibleScreen.title: Add Collectible
addCollectibleScreen.description: If a collectible is missing from your wallet, you can manually add it here.
addCollectibleScreen.alreadyInWallet: This collectible is already in your wallet

errors.collectionNotFound: Collection not found for the given address.
errors.notOwnedByUser: It appears this collectible is not owned by you.
errors.invalidAddressOrTokenId: Please make sure the collection address and token ID are correct.

moreInfo.title: Manage Tokens
moreInfo.block1: When you manage tokens, you're choosing which tokens your wallet can hold and use on the Stellar network. For Stellar Classic, adding a token creates a trustline, allowing your wallet to recognize and interact with it. Soroban tokens don't use trustlines but can still be managed and accessed here.
moreInfo.block2: Verified tokens come from trusted token lists from the ecosystem. Unverified tokens aren't included in those lists, so proceed with caution when adding or transacting with them.

cantRemoveXlm.title: Can’t remove XLM
cantRemoveXlm.description: XLM is the native token of the Stellar network and cannot be removed. It’s required to maintain your account and pay for transaction fees.

cantRemoveBalance.title: Token still has a balance
cantRemoveBalance.description: You can’t remove this token yet. To remove a token, your balance for this token must be 0. You must send or sell the remaining balance before trying again.

addTokenScreen.title: Add a token
addTokenScreen.disclaimer: Allow token to be displayed in your wallet. This does not add the token to your account.
addTokenScreen.removeDisclaimer: Remove token from being displayed and used with this wallet address
addTokenScreen.confirmTrust: Only confirm if you trust this token
addTokenScreen.maliciousToken: This token was flagged as malicious
addTokenScreen.suspiciousToken: This token was flagged as suspicious
addTokenScreen.unableToScanBanner: Unable to scan for malicious tokens
addTokenScreen.somethingWentWrong: Something went wrong, please try again later

securityWarning.expectedToFailDescription: This transaction is expected to fail for the following reasons:
securityWarning.unsafeTransaction: This transaction does not appear safe for the following reasons:
securityWarning.token: This token does not appear safe for the following reasons:

unfunded.title: The destination account doesn’t exist
unfunded.action: Send at least 1 XLM to create the account.

swapScreen.title: Swap

errors.insufficientXlmForFees: Insufficient XLM for transaction fees. You need at least {{fee}} XLM to pay the transaction fee.
errors.noPathFound: No path found between these tokens
errors.pathFindFailed: Couldn't fetch swap path. Please try again.
errors.customTokenSwapNotSupported: Swapping custom tokens is not supported yet
errors.quoteExpired: Quote has expired, please try again to get a new quote

swapScreen.stellarExpertDown: Token discovery is temporarily unavailable. You can still swap between tokens you already hold.
swapScreen.sorobanEmptyState: Soroban contract tokens aren't supported for swaps yet. Try searching for a Classic token instead.

verifiedInfo.title: Verified token
verifiedInfo.body: From trusted token lists in the Stellar ecosystem.

unverifiedInfo.title: Unverified token
unverifiedInfo.body: Not from trusted token lists. Use caution when adding or transacting.

trustlineInfo.title: This will add a trustline to {{tokenCode}}
trustlineInfo.bodyPrefix: To hold {{tokenCode}} in your wallet, Stellar requires a trustline.
trustlineInfo.bodySuffix: from your balance. You can get it back by removing the trustline after your {{tokenCode}} balance is zero.

swapScreen.trustlineBanner: This will add a trustline to {{tokenCode}}

xlmReserve.title: You need XLM to create a trustline
xlmReserve.bodyPrefix: To receive {{tokenCode}}, your wallet needs a trustline on Stellar.
xlmReserve.infoCardBody: Stellar requires this reserve to add {{tokenCode}}. You can get it back once your {{tokenCode}} balance is zero.

swapProcessingScreen.closeMessage: You can close this screen, your transaction should be complete in less than a minute

memoInfo.title: Memo
memoInfo.description: Some destination accounts on the Stellar network require a memo to identify your payment.
memoInfo.additionalInfo: If a required memo is missing or incorrect, your funds may not reach the intended recipient.
memoInfo.sorobanInfo: For Soroban transactions (such as collectible or custom token transfers), memo support depends on the target contract.
memoInfo.memoDisabledForTransaction: Memo is disabled for this transaction.
memoInfo.memoNotSupportedForOperation: Memo is not supported for this operation.

slippageInfo.title: Allowed slippage
slippageInfo.description: The maximum price change (in percentage) you are willing to accept between initiating and confirming your swap. If the market price moves beyond this tolerance, the transaction will not execute.

timeoutInfo.title: Transaction timeout
timeoutInfo.description: Transactions on the Stellar network have a set time limit for processing.
timeoutInfo.additionalInfo: If the transaction is not confirmed before this time, it will expire and need to be submitted again.

feeInfo.title: Transaction fee
feeInfo.description: Every transaction on the Stellar network includes a small fee to help keep the network secure.
feeInfo.additionalInfo: You can choose to increase this fee if you want your transaction to be prioritized and processed faster by the network.

errors.insufficientXlmForFees: XLM insufficient for transaction fees. You need at least {{fee}} XLM to pay the transaction fee.
errors.amountTooHigh: The amount entered is greater than the available balance

muxedAddressWarning.title: Muxed address not supported
muxedAddressWarning.description: This token does not support muxed address (M-) as a target destination. Proceeding with this transaction could result in the loss of the token during the transfer.

errors.malicious: This address was flagged as malicious
errors.suspicious: This address was flagged as suspicious
errors.maliciousToken: A token was flagged as malicious
errors.suspiciousToken: A token was flagged as suspicious

feeBreakdown.title: Fees
feeBreakdown.descriptionClassic: These fees go to the network to process your transaction.
feeBreakdown.descriptionSoroban: These fees go to the network to process your transaction. For Soroban transactions, we run a quick simulation first, so you might see the total fee adjust.

addMemoExplanationBottomSheet.title: Memo is required
addMemoExplanationBottomSheet.description: A destination account requires the use of the memo field which is not present in the transaction you're about to sign.
addMemoExplanationBottomSheet.disabledWarning: Freighter automatically disabled the option to sign this transaction.
addMemoExplanationBottomSheet.checkMemoRequirements: Check the destination account memo requirements and include it in the transaction.

showRecoveryPhraseScreen.accessWarning: Anyone who has access to this phrase has access to your account and to the funds in it, so save it in a safe and secure place.

yourRecoveryPhrase.title: Your Recovery Phrase

welcomeBanner.fundingText2: fund it with at least 1 XLM.
welcomeBanner.minimumBalanceText: Stellar accounts require a minimum balance of 1 XLM to ensure network security and prevent spam.
welcomeBanner.reserveExplanationText: This reserve helps maintain the ledger by covering transaction fees and discouraging the creation of unnecessary accounts, keeping the system efficient and functional.

site.confirmTrust: Only confirm if you trust this site

transaction.unfundedDestination: This is a new account and needs 1 XLM in order to get started. Any transaction to send non-XLM to an unfunded account will fail.
transaction.unfundedDestinationNative: This is a new account and needs at least 1 XLM to be created. Sending less than 1 XLM to create it will fail.

transaction.warning: This transaction was flagged as warning

site.title: Unable to scan site
site.description: We were unable to scan this site for security threats. The site may be safe, but we cannot verify its security status.

unableToScan.info: This does not mean the item is malicious - it simply means we cannot verify its security status.

appUpdate.defaultMessage: Please update your app to the latest version.

forceUpdate.title: Update Required
forceUpdate.description: A new version of Freighter is available. Please update to ensure your wallet performs correctly and securely. Your funds are not affected.
forceUpdate.skipMessage: Using an outdated version may cause errors or failed transactions. By continuing, you accept full responsibility for any issues until you update Freighter.

jailbreakDetected.title: Cannot run on this device
jailbreakDetected.description: This device is rooted or jailbroken, which prevents the app from protecting your wallet keys.
jailbreakDetected.disclaimer: The app is disabled on compromised systems. Install and use it on a device with standard security intact.
